_publications._publicationTitle: DINs: Deep Interactive Networks for Neurofibroma Segmentation in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 on Whole-Body MRI.
_publications._context: we propose deep interactive networks (DINs) to address the above limitations. User interactions guide the model to recognize complicated tumors and quickly adapt to heterogeneous tumors.

basicInfo.description: Deep learning tool for interactive segmentation of neurofibromas in NF1 patients on whole-body MRI; uses user guidance (clicks/scribbles) to handle heterogeneous tumor appearances
